productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Brown Beige Shoe
description: Talk about style and comfort rolled into one, and there's no better shoe than this pair from numero uno. With various materials fused together in blending colours, it speaks volumes of your high style of fashion and comfort. Team this with jeans and tees for those casual Fridays at work.Upper Textured synthetic leather upper with a smooth synthetic leather toe box and suede heel cup for durability, comfort and style Multi-coloured fabric overlay for midfoot support Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Synthetic leather tongue for midfoot comfort Printed branding on tongue for style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort Cambrelle lining for breathability Durable textured rubber foxing along toe box for forefoot protection Brand badge embossed on lateral heel for style Outsole Durable rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for maximum traction and grip Shoe careUse a damp, clean cloth to remove dust from synthetic leather layerUse a suede brush to clean the suede portionsDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
